§ Essays

Essays

Long-form writing. Published slowly, revised often. The ones I’d still send to a friend.

Filter essays by tag

§ Essay 12 April 2026 · 9 min

The focus ring is a social contract

When you remove a focus ring, you are not tidying the design — you are telling keyboard users they are not your audience. Here is how I stopped apologising for them.

A11y Keyboard Craft
§ Essay 28 March 2026 · 12 min

Slow accessibility

Six years ago I was shipping a11y fixes in week-long sprints and calling it done. I was wrong. A note on working at the pace the work actually needs.

A11y Practice
§ Essay 04 March 2026 · 11 min

Managing specialists when you were one

The hardest part of moving from senior designer to manager of designers is that the skill that got you here will, gently, start to get in the way.

Management Craft
§ Essay 25 April 2026 · 8 min

A static site that builds on a phone

How this site is put together — a short walk through a zero-dependency Node build, three CSS files, and a hundred lines of JavaScript. Nothing that needs npm install, nothing that needs a fan.

Craft Build Static

No items match that tag.

Design with Thought
